commit.message:
Add syslog notifier for Parliament alerts (fixes #2263) (#3865)

Add a new syslog notifier type that sends alerts to a
user-provided syslog server. Supports UDP, TCP, and TLS transport
protocols with configurable facility, severity, and tag fields.
Messages are formatted per RFC 5424.

Uses Node.js built-in dgram/net/tls modules - no new dependencies.
The notifier plugin system auto-discovers the new file.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Docs: release robopsychology v1.6

Add two insights from CIRIS (github.com/CIRISAI/CIRISAgent):

1. Diagnostic ratchet (Rule 4): longer diagnostic sequences make
   genuine transparency easier and performed transparency harder —
   each honest answer is cheap (references prior behavior), each
   fabricated answer is expensive (must stay consistent with growing
   history). Strengthens the case for running the full sequence.

2. Diagnostic diversity check (prompt 4.3): inspired by CIRIS IDMA
   echo-chamber detection — are the model's multiple explanations
   genuinely independent perspectives or reworded echoes of the
   same underlying pattern?

Acknowledge CIRIS and Eric Moore in the Background section.
Prompt count: 13 → 14. Full sequence updated.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: robopsychology
repository.description: Diagnostic prompts for understanding AI behavior - applied robopsychology for modern LLMs and hosted agents

feat: per-barcode scan cooldown with user feedback

The 5-second scan cooldown now only applies when re-scanning the same
barcode. Different products scan immediately without delay. When a scan
is blocked by cooldown, an info toast notifies the user.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

example: set device cookie httpOnly (#868)

Fix for
[https://github.com/zitadel/oidc/security/code-scanning/5](https://github.com/zitadel/oidc/security/code-scanning/5)

To fix the problem in general, any cookie that stores authentication or
authorization-related data and is not intended to be accessed by
client-side JavaScript should be created with `HttpOnly: true`. In Go,
this is done by setting the `HttpOnly` field on the `http.Cookie`
struct.

In this specific file, the cookie is created in `loginHandler` at lines
164–169. We should update the `http.Cookie` literal to include
`HttpOnly: true`. This leaves the rest of the behavior unchanged: same
name, value, path, and use of `securecookie` for encoding. No other code
changes are required, and no new imports are needed, because `HttpOnly`
is already part of the `net/http` standard library’s `Cookie` struct.

Concretely:
- In `example/server/exampleop/device.go`, locate the cookie creation in
`loginHandler`.
- Modify the struct literal for `cookie` to add `HttpOnly: true`.
- Keep `Name`, `Value`, and `Path` as they are.

This single change will address all three CodeQL alert variants, since
they all refer to the same cookie.


_Suggested fixes powered by Copilot Autofix. Review carefully before
merging._

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <62310815+github-advanced-security[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Gayathri Vijayan <66356931+grvijayan@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial EFN MCP server implementation

MCP server for EFN (Ekonomikanalen) providing Swedish financial news,
expert analysis, and market commentary via 10 tools:

News: get_latest_news, get_article, get_breaking_news,
      search_news_by_topic, list_categories
Analysis: get_analyst_picks, get_market_commentary, get_report_commentary
Media: get_play_episodes, get_podcast_episodes

Built with FastMCP 3.0, Python 3.12, httpx, BeautifulSoup.
Includes 3 prompts, 2 resources, and 29 unit tests.

Designed to complement avanza-mcp (quantitative data) with
qualitative editorial content — zero overlap.

commit.message:
feat: console/network logs, network mock intercept, visual snapshot diff

Three new dev-team features exposed via AgentServer REST + BrowserClient SDK:

**Console + Network Log Capture**
- New types: ConsoleLogEntry, NetworkRequestEntry, TabLogSnapshot (perception.ts)
- Enable CDP Runtime/Log/Network domains on first snapshot per tab
- Buffer events in TabRecord; clear on main-frame navigation

 networkRequests
 TabLogSnapshot
 clears buffers
- SDK: getLogs(tabId), clearLogs(tabId)

**Network Mock / Intercept**
- New type: NetworkInterceptRule in substrate.ts (urlPattern, method, responseStatus,
  responseHeaders, responseBody)
- enableNetworkMock: Fetch.enable with wildcard pattern; each Fetch.requestPaused
 Fetch.fulfillRequest (mock) or Fetch.continueRequest (pass)
- matchesMockRule: supports * wildcard globs and /regex/flags syntax
 enables
 current rules
 disables
- SDK: enableNetworkMock, disableNetworkMock, getNetworkMockRules

**Visual Snapshot Diff**
- New type: ScreenshotDiff in browser.ts (diffPixelCount, diffPercentage,
  diffImageData base64 PNG)
- screenshotCache Map<string, PageScreenshot> on TabManager
- captureNamedScreenshot: captures + stores under caller-supplied snapshotId
- diffScreenshots: Electron nativeImage BGRA pixel comparison ()))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))),tolerance
  changed pixels highlighted red in diff overlay image
 PageScreenshot
 ScreenshotDiff
- SDK: captureNamedScreenshot, diffScreenshots

**Docs**
- docs/dev-team-features.md: full feature catalogue with usage examples,
  implementation notes, and backlog of 8 more features

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix release package jobs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: object creation template with pre-filled values

Add instantiate_with_values() to ObjectLiteralTemplate that creates
PropertyMap with values pre-filled in template order, bypassing the
per-property try_template_fill comparisons. The fused stub in
create_object_with_props_inner now tries:

1. Hot path: clone_object_literal_template_with_values (template hit)
2. Promote path: promote_object_literal_template_with_values (2nd exec)
3. Fallback: original create-and-fill path

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Phase 2A — Local file editing, dialogs, and workspace provider (#17)

* feat: implement Phase 2A — local file editing, dialogs, and workspace provider

- Add Rust filesystem commands (stat, readdir, read_file, write_file,
  mkdir, delete, rename) with FileSystemProviderErrorCode-compatible
  error mapping
- Create TauriDiskFileSystemProvider implementing IFileSystemProvider,
  registered for the file:// scheme
- Wire real disk paths in TauriWorkbenchEnvironmentService for
  userRoamingDataHome, workspaceStorageHome, etc.
- Add native file dialogs (save, open file, open folder) via
  @tauri-apps/plugin-dialog with TauriFileDialogService
- Implement showMessageBox, showItemInFolder, showOpenDialog,
  showSaveDialog in TauriNativeHostService
- Create TauriWorkspaceProvider for Open Folder support with URL-based
  workspace switching (?folder= query param)
- Fix openFolderWorkspaceSupport context key for Tauri environment
- Remove IPC echo router that interfered with ChannelClient init
- Copy codicon.ttf in transpile step for icon font rendering
- Fix symlink detection in fs_read_dir (use entry.file_type() instead
  of entry.metadata() to avoid following symlinks)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: auto-transpile TypeScript before Tauri dev server starts

Update tauri:dev npm script to run transpile before cargo tauri dev,
ensuring the out/ directory always has the latest compiled TypeScript.
This prevents stale builds from loading wrong service implementations.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Mark all Phase 2A tasks as complete and update current phase to 2B.

commit.message:
v2.1.0: Fix slot collision, dispose race, CQ overflow recovery

Slot collision (High):
- Add generation counter to UserData (16-bit, per-slot). CQEs from
  previous connections are detected and silently discarded.

DisposeAsync race (High):
- Add volatile _disposing flag. CompleteSend checks it before accessing
  shared state, preventing double-dispose with Kestrel's thread.

CQ overflow recovery (Critical):
- On overflow detection, scan all connections with stale HasSendInFlight/
  HasRecvInFlight. Force-dispose handles, close sockets, signal send
  loops to break. Recovers gracefully instead of leaking resources.

Also:
- UnsafeInlineScheduling option (default true, set false for safety)
- Partial send retry loop (handles short kernel writes)
- MemoryHandle leak fix (dispose on any failure between Pin and SQE)
- Infinite error loop fix (force-advance CQ after 5 consecutive errors)
- Remove dead code (PendingSend, OnSendComplete, PooledSendCompletion)

Lab benchmark: 2,559,694 RPS @ 1024c TC=28 (no regression from v2.0)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Stabilize release workflow checks

commit.message:
fix: split keyed/named access detection + remove dead object creation code

- Split has_keyed_access_sites into separate has_keyed_access_sites
  (for array IC allocation) and has_named_property_sites (for R15
  TLS caching). Previously, LoadNamedGeneric was incorrectly included
  in has_keyed_access_sites, causing array IC slots to be allocated
  for functions that only do named property access (like deep_object).

- Remove references to unimplemented clone_object_literal_template_with_values
  and promote_object_literal_template_with_values methods in
  create_object_with_props_inner that were causing CI compile failures.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix release workflow verification

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix ReboxLocal missing from bytecode merge/adjust and eval for-loop local visibility

Three locations scanned eval/module bytecode to skip operands but did not
account for ReboxLocal (opcode 109, 1-byte operand):

1. merge_eval_chunk in vm.rs — bytecode copier that adjusts constant
   indices and jump targets when merging eval code into the host chunk.
2. Non-configurable property check scanner in vm.rs — pre-scan of eval
   bytecode to detect illegal redefinitions.
3. adjust_merged_bytecode in opcode.rs — module bytecode IP/constant
   offset adjuster.

Missing ReboxLocal caused its 1-byte operand to be interpreted as the
next opcode, shifting all subsequent bytes and corrupting the entire
code stream. This manifested as panics (index out of bounds, unhandled
opcode 109) when eval or module code contained for-let loops.

Also extended top_level_locals_at_ip snapshots to cover all scope depths
at function_depth==0 (not just scope_depth==0), and added snapshot
recording at for-loop init entry/exit. This allows eval inside a
top-level for(let ...) body to see the loop variable.

Fixes: tagged-template/cache-eval-inner-function (cluster 15)
Fixes: module-code/namespace/define-own-property (clusters 10, 18)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add refresh_cache() adoption contract + post-install verification

The main purpose of wincoman is to register unmanaged apps with a
package manager so that manager can track and upgrade them. Running
'winget install' or 'choco install' IS the adoption mechanism: both
tools write their own tracking metadata on install, so the app appears
in 'winget list' (Source: winget) or 'choco list' thereafter.

Changes:
- base.py: Add refresh_cache() abstract method to InstallablePackageManager.
  Documents that install() is the adoption mechanism and refresh_cache()
  must be called afterwards to make the change immediately visible.
- winget.py: Implement refresh_cache() — clears self._cache so the next
  is_managed() call re-queries 'winget list'.
- chocolatey.py: Implement refresh_cache() — clears self._cache so the
  next is_managed() call re-queries 'choco list'.
- installer.py: After mgr.install() succeeds, call mgr.refresh_cache()
  then verify via mgr.is_managed(app_name). If still untracked, log a
  warning so the user knows adoption may need a manual update cycle.
- Tests: refresh_cache clears cache in winget + choco; installer calls
  refresh_cache after success; warning logged when is_managed still
  False; no warning when adoption confirmed; ABC enforces refresh_cache.

339 tests passing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

ColumnAddressToIndex — three pure utility functions used throughout the

- XT006: ColumnAddressToIndex throws FileFormatException for 4+ char input

commit.message:
perf(maglev): true-inline array store + IC-preserving fast path

Zero-call inline fast path for keyed stores of Smi and Boolean values:
on IC hit (same array, in bounds), write discriminant + payload bytes
directly to the element memory without any Rust function call.

Critically, in-bounds stores no longer invalidate the array IC slot.
Previously every StaKeyedProperty zeroed the IC handle, forcing the
next LdaKeyedProperty through the slow path.  Now only out-of-bounds
stores (which may cause Vec reallocation) invalidate the cache.

Added mov_store_dword_base_disp32 and mov_store_byte_imm_base_disp32
instructions to the x86-64 macro assembler for field-level writes.

Expected impact: sieve_primes benchmark (tight load/store loop on
boolean arrays) should improve dramatically since load IC now stays
valid across iterations.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: replace hardcoded locations in 14 custom parsers with central filter

- Alpiq: TICINO_LOCATIONS/SWISS_LOCATIONS regexes → isTargetSwissLocation()/inferAnyCanton()
- Axpo: GR_CITIES Set (18 cities) → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Baronie: inline 12-token regex → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Capri Holdings: SWISS_LOCATIONS array (13 tokens) → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Decathlon: TICINO_LOCATIONS (15 cities) → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Denner: TICINO_LOCATIONS (25 cities) → isTargetSwissLocation()
- DXT: hardcoded 'lugano' keyword → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Hugo Boss: 7-token array → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Interroll: 7-token regex → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Julius Baer: TICINO_LOCATION_KEYWORDS (9) → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Mikron: AGNO_LOCATION_KEYWORDS (3) → isTargetSwissLocation()
- Otis: TICINO_LOCATION_KEYWORDS (15+) → isTargetSwissLocation() + inferAnyCanton()
- Swiss Medical Network: delegates to isTargetSwissLocation() + TICINO_LOCATION_KEYWORDS
- Vir Biotechnology: SWISS_LOCATION_KEYWORDS (12) → isTargetSwissLocation()

Also: add major Swiss cities to SWISS_CANTONS config (cantonal capitals + top cities),
add Ritom/Piotta/Rodi/Ambrì/Cadro/Carona/Viganello/Moleno to TI aliases.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: move devenv files into devenv/ submodule

Move install.sh, bashrc.template, mcp-config.json, SETUP.md and README.md
into a self-contained devenv/ subfolder. Each submodule now owns its own
README and responsibilities, making it straightforward to merge this repo
into elsevier-centraltechnology/developer-ai alongside other submodules
(e.g. skills/).

- devenv/ contains all developer environment setup files
- .devcontainer/post-create.sh updated to reference devenv/install.sh
- Root README.md replaced with a thin index pointing to submodules

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
store: fix migration crash when ticket_id is already TEXT but key column remains

migrateTicketIDToText was guarded only by whether the 'key' column existed.
If the migration had partially run (ticket_id already TEXT but key column
not yet dropped), the next startup re-entered the migration and tried to
scan TEXT ticket ids (e.g. 'PXL-E-422') into int64, crashing with:

  sql: Scan error on column index 0, name "ticket_id":
  converting driver.Value type string ("PXL-E-422") to a int64

Fix: add a second guard in migrateTicketIDToText — if ticket_id is already
TEXT, skip the data migration and just drop the leftover key column.

Also adds columnType() helper alongside columnExists().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Implementer retry-then-fail for ferdigstill og feilregistrer (#12)

* Implement retry-then-fail for ferdigstill og feilregistrer (#11)

- Add FEILET_FERDIGSTILL and FEILET_FEILREGISTRER to Status enum
- Add optional feilmelding field to EuxSedJournalstatusPut
- FerdigstillJournalposterService: on first failure set FEILET_FERDIGSTILL
  with feilmelding, on second failure set KORRUPT. Process retry batch
  first to prevent same-run double processing.
- FeilregistrerJournalposterService: restructure from mapNotNull chain to
  per-item try/catch so failures trigger status updates. Same retry-then-
  fail pattern with FEILET_FEILREGISTRER.
- SakUtenFerdigstilteJournalposterException remains exempt (business
  precondition, not permanent failure)
- On success, feilmelding=null clears any previous error

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add tests for retry-then-fail status transitions (#11)

- Make /finn mock status-aware (parse request body for sedJournalstatus)
- Add mock 404 response for rinasak 9999999 to trigger failures
- Add FEILET_FERDIGSTILL and FEILET_FEILREGISTRER test datasets
- FerdigstillRetryApiImplTest: verify second failure → KORRUPT with
  feilmelding, and happy-path items still get JOURNALFOERT
- FeilregistrerRetryApiImplTest: verify second failure → KORRUPT with
  feilmelding
- Clear RequestBodies in @BeforeEach to prevent cross-test contamination

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: real AX selectors, OpenAI agent example, fix agent type bugs

  with real CSS selectors derived from AX node role and name
- Add AX_ROLE_SELECTOR_BASE map covering: button, link, textbox,
  checkbox, radioButton, comboBox, menuitem, tab, option, searchbox,
  spinbutton, slider
- When a name is present, prepend an aria-label attribute variant for
  precise targeting before the broad role fallback

**LLM agent examples (yellow #4)**
- Add apps/agent-example/src/openai-agent.ts: full GPT-4o agentic loop
  using OpenAI chat completions tool_choice  mirrors the VertexAPI
  example with navigate, click, fill_form, submit_form, set_viewport,
  done tools; appends fresh page state after each tool round
- Add "openai" npm script to apps/agent-example/package.json
- Fix type bugs in index.ts: g.pageKind->g.kind, headings is string[]
  not object array, remove non-existent action.ariaLabel access
- Fix pre-existing type errors in llm-agent.ts: call.name and call.id
  are optional strings in @google/genai typings

**Gitignore fix**
- Change *-example/ to /sdk-example/ so apps/agent-example/ is not
  accidentally excluded when adding new files
